title: Ursus in the Land of Fire
writer: Luciano Martino, Marcello Ciorciolini, Ernesto Gastaldi
actors: Ed Fury, Luciana Gilli, Adriano Micantoni
plot: Hamilan, a cruel and ambitious general, murders his king and places himself on the throne with the former king's evil niece as his queen. He then wages war against his peaceful neighbors, killing their women and enslaving their me...
